case_title: WOODCOCK, ROBERT vs. MUNTEAN, BROOKE et al

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY, POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT MUNTEAN, BROOKE
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOODCOCK, ROBERT COURT TRIAL SET FOR SEP-23-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 07 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

JUDGE: TOMAR MASON/CLERK:ECLAVERIA/REPORTER WAIVED 9:20AM: C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PRESENT: PLFF AND COUNSEL JOSEPH SACRAMENTO. PLFF'S CSL CALLED ROBERT WOODCOCK, S/E PLFF EXH. 1 (RENTAL AGREEMENT), ID/EVID " " 2 (3-DAY NOTICE TO PAY RENT/QUIT), ID/EVID JUDGMENT: JUDGMT FOR PLAINTIFF FOR POS/RESTIT. OF PREMISES LOCATED AT 1449 SO.VAN NESS AVE, #3,SF,CA; FORFEITURE OF RENTAL AGREEMENT; MONEY JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $1325, ATTORNEY'S FEE AND COST PER COST BILL. EXHIBITS W/DRAWN AND PLFF'S COUNSEL PREPARES JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MUNTEAN, BROOKE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1449 SO. VAN NESS AVENUE #3 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $1,325.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,325.00, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF. AWARDED ATTORNEY FEES AND COST PER COST BILL.
